name: Ahlquist, Robert Wilhelm
description: Quite a whiz at E.E.! Took such a liking to the A.C. and D.C. stuff that he took all the courses offered, and wants to put some more out.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quite a whiz at E.E.! Took such a liking to the A.C. and D.C. stuff that he took all the courses offered, and wants to put some more out.

name: Andrews, J. L.
description: One of Jackson's proteges who thought that Boyce taught something about efficiency. The wisdom of his decision is still in question.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of Jackson's proteges who thought that Boyce taught something about efficiency. The wisdom of his decision is still in question.

name: Beagles, Harry Jay
description: Harry goes to Joplin every holiday and for this reason rarely starts school the first of the week. He can do anything from spotting a mineral to carrying a hod.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Harry goes to Joplin every holiday and for this reason rarely starts school the first of the week. He can do anything from spotting a mineral to carrying a hod.

name: Beck, Thomas Henry
description: Another Coal Miner; puts out quite a few lectures on "When you get out in practice the nice soft job isn't waiting". However, he seems well prepared.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Another Coal Miner; puts out quite a few lectures on "When you get out in practice the nice soft job isn't waiting". However, he seems well prepared.

name: Blake, Philip Leroy
description: One of the most versatile men in the class; can do anything from building a zinc furnace to making a political speech on five minutes notice.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the most versatile men in the class; can do anything from building a zinc furnace to making a political speech on five minutes notice.

name: Bowers, Carlos G.
description: Jackie Coogan—Extra hard-boiled Mining Engineer; professional promoter and side-door Pullman adventurer. Chief composer of "Leggo my arm, I can swim to the porch from here". Didn't let his studies interfere with his education.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Jackie Coogan—Extra hard-boiled Mining Engineer; professional promoter and side-door Pullman adventurer. Chief composer of "Leggo my arm, I can swim to the porch from here". Didn't let his studies interfere with his education.

name: Campbell, Jack Percy
description: After being a bright and shining light for four years, Jack leaves us to conquer new fields. He has done well in basketball, football, studies, and in fact, everything besides making himself known as a man among women.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: After being a bright and shining light for four years, Jack leaves us to conquer new fields. He has done well in basketball, football, studies, and in fact, everything besides making himself known as a man among women.

name: Casey, Walter Eric
description: One of the few divinely inspired ones that ever knocked Frame off in E.E.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the few divinely inspired ones that ever knocked Frame off in E.E.

name: Crutcher, Welborn B.
description: "Crutch" is one of the old timers; he came to Rolla in 1917 but left soon after to enlist in the Army. After the war he returned to do battle with the Faculty and has been successful in all his encounters.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Crutch" is one of the old timers; he came to Rolla in 1917 but left soon after to enlist in the Army. After the war he returned to do battle with the Faculty and has been successful in all his encounters.

name: Devereaux, Andrew
description: Andrew left us at the middle of the year to return to "Mexico" where we hope no Revolution will mar his happiness.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Andrew left us at the middle of the year to return to "Mexico" where we hope no Revolution will mar his happiness.

name: Dierking, George Thomas
motto: "By the way, loan me a cigarette."
description: In "Tight" we have a true Southern Gentleman. He has never been known to make a bridge inspection trip.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"By the way, loan me a cigarette."
In "Tight" we have a true Southern Gentleman. He has never been known to make a bridge inspection trip.

name: Drouot, Harold Roberts
description: Hopes to be a Civil Engineer, but has high talents along other lines. Noted for the paucity of his girl acquaintances.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hopes to be a Civil Engineer, but has high talents along other lines. Noted for the paucity of his girl acquaintances.

name: Gabler, George Charles
description: In George's four years at M.S.M., he has distinguished himself in excelling at the arts of football, track and studying. With the fair sex he is a whiz, and when he attains his mighty ambition of raising a moustache no one can say how far he will go.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: In George's four years at M.S.M., he has distinguished himself in excelling at the arts of football, track and studying. With the fair sex he is a whiz, and when he attains his mighty ambition of raising a moustache no one can say how far he will go.

name: Hardy, James Wheeler
description: "Jim" came to us at the beginning of the year after sojourns at M. U. and the Colorado School of Mines. If his determination may be judged from his physiognomy his chances for success are unlimited.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Jim" came to us at the beginning of the year after sojourns at M. U. and the Colorado School of Mines. If his determination may be judged from his physiognomy his chances for success are unlimited.

name: Howald, Leon Sidney
description: Cherishes the belief that he is the best looking man in school. "Duke" should take the Physical Culture Prize for maximum development in a given time.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Cherishes the belief that he is the best looking man in school. "Duke" should take the Physical Culture Prize for maximum development in a given time.

name: Hunt, Joseph Owen
description: Is quite a bear with the women—must be, for he says so himself—ask him. Has made himself famous in the athletic world through his connection with the R.H.S. "Neversweats".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is quite a bear with the women—must be, for he says so himself—ask him. Has made himself famous in the athletic world through his connection with the R.H.S. "Neversweats".

name: Kemper, Claude Lester
description: A real basketball and football star whose loss will be greatly felt at M.S.M. Little Claudie's ambition in life is two-fold: to become serious just once, and to call St. Louis without using a 'phone.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A real basketball and football star whose loss will be greatly felt at M.S.M. Little Claudie's ambition in life is two-fold: to become serious just once, and to call St. Louis without using a 'phone.

name: Kentnor, Charles Berry, Jr.
description: Is an ardent devotee of the Terpsichorean Art and few are the "brawls" in the gym that are not graced by his presence.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is an ardent devotee of the Terpsichorean Art and few are the "brawls" in the gym that are not graced by his presence.

name: Kessler, Harry Harvey
description: Is one of the fastest fighters that ever hit Rolla, and is one of the finest all-around fellows in the class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Is one of the fastest fighters that ever hit Rolla, and is one of the finest all-around fellows in the class.

name: Knight, William Elam Hall
description: Has terrorized the Freshmen Chemistry students; made a path of his own to the Rolla High School, and has been a pillar of the church. Should receive the degree of "M.E."—"Methodist Engineer".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Has terrorized the Freshmen Chemistry students; made a path of his own to the Rolla High School, and has been a pillar of the church. Should receive the degree of "M.E."—"Methodist Engineer".

name: McBrian, Ray
description: May generally be found somewhere in the Met Building reclining gracefully on the bone ash settee. Another charter member of the C.Y.C. Club.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: May generally be found somewhere in the Met Building reclining gracefully on the bone ash settee. Another charter member of the C.Y.C. Club.

name: Magalis, Cyrus West
description: Independent. "Tex" claims to be the only man who ever outran a charge of buckshot. Ask him about his Eminence trip. The only man in Dake's Oil and Gas Class who knows "Where is the Tyner Sand and Why".
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Independent. "Tex" claims to be the only man who ever outran a charge of buckshot. Ask him about his Eminence trip. The only man in Dake's Oil and Gas Class who knows "Where is the Tyner Sand and Why".

name: Matlack, Fred P.
description: "Freddie" did time as a Civil Engineer; signed up for Mining and finally sank to Metallurgy. From his knowledge of "corn" we think he should have taken Agriculture.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Freddie" did time as a Civil Engineer; signed up for Mining and finally sank to Metallurgy. From his knowledge of "corn" we think he should have taken Agriculture.

name: Moodie, Dwight Linford
description: "Hanna" has been known as a woman-hater by some of the "400" but a man with such a dimple and such a moustache must always be on the defense from feminine attacks.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Hanna" has been known as a woman-hater by some of the "400" but a man with such a dimple and such a moustache must always be on the defense from feminine attacks.

name: Naylor, Arch Waugh, Jr.
motto: "Never let studying interfere with your college education."
description: The dignity of being a Senior sits lightly on the shoulders of Archie. His time for the most part is taken up with a thousand important things which absolutely must be done.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Never let studying interfere with your college education."
The dignity of being a Senior sits lightly on the shoulders of Archie. His time for the most part is taken up with a thousand important things which absolutely must be done.

name: Robertson, Edward E.
description: Hails from Tennessee and comes to us from the Colorado School of Mines as a Senior. Has never been known to use the harmless little letter "r"; but that gets him by great with the fair ones.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from Tennessee and comes to us from the Colorado School of Mines as a Senior. Has never been known to use the harmless little letter "r"; but that gets him by great with the fair ones.

name: Schaeffer, Willard A. Jr.
description: Has a penchant for porch swings, and a strong dislike for porch lights. Lead with his chin quite effectively once in an encounter with the concrete bleachers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text:
"Any door can be opened."
Has a penchant for porch swings, and a strong dislike for porch lights. Lead with his chin quite effectively once in an encounter with the concrete bleachers.

name: Schapiro, Leo
description: Member in good standing of the C.Y.C. Club and the terror of the Frosh Trig classes. A veritable walking Math text.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Member in good standing of the C.Y.C. Club and the terror of the Frosh Trig classes. A veritable walking Math text.

name: Scott, Guy R.
description: Real curls, blue eyes 'n everything— "Just cute," she told him. Charter member of the Post Office Loungers Retreat. However, Scottie is a real guy; only when he warbles the "Civil Engineer" instead of the real thing, we have to jump on him.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Real curls, blue eyes 'n everything— "Just cute," she told him. Charter member of the Post Office Loungers Retreat. However, Scottie is a real guy; only when he warbles the "Civil Engineer" instead of the real thing, we have to jump on him.

name: Sitzler, Carl Wm.
description: One of the C.E. guns. Likes to talk in the language of stress and strain; has increased his visits to the big city to at least once a week. There must be a real attraction there.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: One of the C.E. guns. Likes to talk in the language of stress and strain; has increased his visits to the big city to at least once a week. There must be a real attraction there.

name: Stack, William, Jr.
description: "Tertius Q", gentle reader, is the proud possessor of a marcelle wave, and an automatic self-filling flagon. Sole ambition is to prove the existence of vast "goophite" deposits which he claims are hidden back of the Conemaugh Mountains, Irish Free State.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Tertius Q", gentle reader, is the proud possessor of a marcelle wave, and an automatic self-filling flagon. Sole ambition is to prove the existence of vast "goophite" deposits which he claims are hidden back of the Conemaugh Mountains, Irish Free State.

name: Stover, Curtis Edward
description: After talking in his sleep for a semester, Curt embarked upon the Great Adventure with the eventual St. Pat's Queen of '23. He has proven to be a real hard rock Miner. He is also the proud Daddy of Jimmy Stover, Class '41, M.S.M.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: After talking in his sleep for a semester, Curt embarked upon the Great Adventure with the eventual St. Pat's Queen of '23. He has proven to be a real hard rock Miner. He is also the proud Daddy of Jimmy Stover, Class '41, M.S.M.

name: Thompson, Peter F.
description: Quiet and reserved but of true mettle. What comparatively few dates he has had have never ceased sighing.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Quiet and reserved but of true mettle. What comparatively few dates he has had have never ceased sighing.

name: Thomas, T. R.
description: "Shorty" is noted for his arguments with Thorny. The walls of the Met Building will long echo with their harmonious discord.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Shorty" is noted for his arguments with Thorny. The walls of the Met Building will long echo with their harmonious discord.

name: Walker, Arthur W.
description: "Spoof" is always ready to discuss the manly sport of wrestling or, in fact, anything; is strongly under the impression that "Who's Who in America" or anywhere else hails from New Jersey.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Spoof" is always ready to discuss the manly sport of wrestling or, in fact, anything; is strongly under the impression that "Who's Who in America" or anywhere else hails from New Jersey.

name: Weimer, W. H.
description: Spent quite a few years off and on at M.S.M. Likes to tell about Coal Mining's wonderful future and how they farm back in Kansas. He has a great liking for Wyoming so there must be some attraction there.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Spent quite a few years off and on at M.S.M. Likes to tell about Coal Mining's wonderful future and how they farm back in Kansas. He has a great liking for Wyoming so there must be some attraction there.

name: Wright, Wilfred Stillman
description: Where the name "Pop" originated no one knows, but in spite of this title, his big moustache and wonderful sideburns, he is one of the best little men in the class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Where the name "Pop" originated no one knows, but in spite of this title, his big moustache and wonderful sideburns, he is one of the best little men in the class.
